uk: Св. преподобномученика Лук'яна, пресвітера Великої Антіохії.
saints.en: Ven. Euthymius the New. Ven. Protomartyr Lucian, Presbyter of Great Antioch

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 прп., 3 прпмч., Сл., І нині: богород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар прп., Сл.: прпмч., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря прпмч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. прп. і прпмч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар прп. (2), Сл.: прпмч., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря прпмч. Катизми чергові, сідальні Октоїха. Канон Октоїха, прп. і прпмч. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, прп., Сл.: прпмч., І нині: богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар прп., Сл.: прпмч., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря прпмч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. прп. і прпмч.
Часи: на 1-му – тропар дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му – прп. та 9-му – прпмч.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – Кол. 252 зач.; 1, 24-29. Єв. – Лк. 41 зач.; 9, 7-11.

troparion_en.text: The image of God was truly preserved in you, O Father, / for you took up the Cross and followed Christ. / By so doing you taught us to disregard the flesh for it passes away / but to care instead for the soul, since it is immortal. / Therefore your spirit, venerable Euthymius, rejoices with the angels.

kontakion_en.text: Crossing dryshod through the storms of life, / venerable and divinely wise Euthymius, / you mightily drowned the bodiless foe in the streams of your tears; / you received the gift of miracles to heal all sufferings. / Unceasingly pray for us all.

matched_oca_saint: Venerable Euthymius the New of Thessalonica, and Monk of Mount Athos

oca_saints.name: Venerable Euthymius the New of Thessalonica, and Monk of Mount Athos

troparion.text: The image of God was truly preserved in you, O Father, / for you took up the Cross and followed Christ. / By so doing you taught us to disregard the flesh for it passes away / but to care instead for the soul, since it is immortal. / Therefore your spirit, venerable Euthymius, rejoices with the angels.

kontakion.text: Crossing dryshod through the storms of life, / venerable and divinely wise Euthymius, / you mightily drowned the bodiless foe in the streams of your tears; / you received the gift of miracles to heal all sufferings. / Unceasingly pray for us all.

oca_saints.name: Martyr Lucian the Presbyter of Antioch

troparion.text: Your holy martyr Lucian, O Lord, / through his suffering has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text: We honor you with hymns of glory, / Lucian, the radiant star. / You first became radiant by your detachment from the things of this world; / then you were raised up by your struggle. / Unceasingly pray for us all.

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father John, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

oca_saints.name: Hieromartyr Lucian the Presbyter of the Kiev Caves

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Lucian, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Martyrs Sarbelius and Bebaia of Edessa

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs Sarbelius and Bebaia, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Sabinus, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

oca_saints.name: “Multiplier of Wheat” Icon of the Mother of God

troparion.text: O Most Pure Virgin Mary, Mother of the King of heaven and earth, /  you look lovingly upon those who love your Son, Christ our God,  / and upon those who labor in His name for eternal salvation, /  and you give them all that is abundant for their enjoyment.  / You were shown to be a Multiplier of bread for them,  / delivering them from all want and constraint,  / and providing for these, your servants,  / deliverance from eternal torment and eternal life.
